name: Brick Breaker Puzzle Game
description: Brick Breaker Game is a classic arcade-style experience reimagined with modern visuals, smooth controls, and addictive gameplay. Step into a world of colorful blocks and fast reflex challenges where your goal is simple yet thrilling — break all the bricks, clear levels, and achieve the highest score. Designed for players of all ages, this game combines nostalgic arcade fun with fresh excitement.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
